title: Brooklyn DA — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across Kings County (Brooklyn) District Attorney object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the WordPress content on brooklynda.org (the only machine-readable surface, via its /wp-json/wp/v2 REST API) and the net-new resource model this assessment proposes. There is NO NYC Open Data for the Brooklyn DA, so unlike other NYC domains these definitions are grounded in the site's own information architecture (bureaus, programs, press releases) plus the shared NYC geography spine. Because all five NYC county DA offices share the same functions, these definitions are intentionally office-neutral — a candidate spine for one shared DA API.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

County.description: The NY county a District Attorney's office prosecutes for. Brooklyn = Kings.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

Bureau.description: The DA bureau, unit, or division a record belongs to — derived from the brooklynda.org site sections (bureaus and units are the office's primary organizing structure).
examples: School Advocacy and Juvenile Crimes Bureau

Language.description: Language for language-access content (the site publishes many brochures in multiple languages).

ContentStatus.description: WordPress publication status of a content-derived record.
